examples: They are gradually tapering off production of the older models.
Your nausea should be tapering off and your energy should be returning.
Ultrastructurally, the tumor cells had tapering nuclei with long, delicate cytoplasmic processes associated with prominent subplasmalemmal pinocytotic vesicles.
At dawn, the amplified strains of the call to prayer issue from tapering minarets in every suburb.
Today, Representative Kevin Brady, a Republican from Texas, asked Bernanke when the tapering will begin.
